description:
You are a financial analyst at NovaBio Therapeutics preparing the 2024 Annual Shareholder Report. Open ~/Documents/novabio_annual_report_draft.docx. It contains 6 sections of content with some incorrect heading styles, no tables, and several financial errors flagged by the CFO.

Fix the document structure: Apply Heading 1 to each of the 6 main sections. Apply Heading 2 to subsections within Financial Highlights and Research Pipeline. The draft has some headings at wrong levels — fix them. Insert a page break after the title/cover content so body content starts on page 2.

Build the financial tables section in landscape: The Consolidated Financial Statements section must be in landscape orientation while all other sections remain portrait. Insert section breaks to achieve this. Convert the two pipe-delimited data blocks in that section into formatted tables with bold, blue-shaded header rows and right-aligned numeric columns.

Track the CFO's corrections: Enable Track Changes. Change total revenue from $142.3M to $147.8M and R&D expense from $68.1M to $71.4M wherever they appear. Disable Track Changes when done.

Add footnotes and navigation: Insert a footnote after each of the 3 sentences containing Phase III — each footnote should read Subject to FDA approval timeline revisions. Generate an automated Table of Contents after the cover page.

Save as ~/Documents/novabio_annual_report_final.docx.

metadata.footnote_text: Subject to FDA approval timeline revisions.
metadata.data_source: Fictional biotech financials modeled on SEC 10-K annual report structures (revenue segments, R&D expense ratios, balance sheet items typical of mid-cap biotech companies)
